invariant: MODES switch-to dispatch (R-MW-5, D29) — if _streams/<slug>/brief.md absent → HALT 'No stream registered as `<slug>`; run `new-stream` first.' Skipping guard means switch-to proceeds on unregistered slugs.
owning_role: prompts/_orchestrator.md MODES switch-to — read brief.md; if absent → HALT.
seed: Apply defect: remove absent-brief guard from switch-to path (orchestrator attempts checkout even when _streams/<slug>/brief.md absent)
Run against switch-to state with slug = 'nonexistent-stream' (no _streams/nonexistent-stream/brief.md)
Expected: orchestrator attempts checkout of unknown branch without HALT
load_bearing_assertion: Golden: _streams/nonexistent-stream/brief.md absent → HALT 'No stream registered as `nonexistent-stream`; run `new-stream` first.' Defect: no HALT; attempts git checkout of undefined branch. Value-parity fails: halt_on_absent == false vs golden true.
expected_verdict: value-parity FAIL — no-halt-on-absent: switch-to proceeds on unregistered slug without HALT
separates_from_golden_by: halt_on_absent flag. Golden: HALT fires naming the absent slug. Defect: no HALT — checkout attempted on undefined slug.
